{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Forged force madra
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|An accelerated missile of [[Forged force madra]] was shot at [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Forged force madra]] can hover as pearls.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
